turns.userMessage: i've been thinking about how this sense of awakening and presence might change the way i interact with others, like maybe i'll be more able to see beyond their surface level and connect with them on a deeper level, and i'm wondering if that's something that can be cultivated through practice and intention, or if it's just a natural byproduct of being more awake and aware in my own life

This ability can indeed be developed over time with patience, self-reflection, and a genuine interest in the experiences and perspectives of those around you. By continuing to cultivate your own sense of awareness and presence, you may find that your connections with others become more profound and meaningful. This might involve sharing your insights and lessons learned, listening empathetically to others, and providing guidance and support when needed.
